combo.title: Special plays
combo.empty: No special plays available with your current hand.

desc.rideByNight: Knight + Road Building together: move the robber and steal, then build 1 free road.
desc.nightOfPlenty: Knight + Year of Plenty together: move the robber and steal, then take 1 free resource.
desc.monorail: Monopoly + Road Building together: take all lumber and brick from every other player, then build 1-2 free roads.
desc.megaKnight: Play 2 Knights at once: move the robber and steal a development card (not a resource) from a chosen opponent.
desc.superSettle: Discard a Victory Point card to upgrade a settlement straight to a city for free.

reason.cardNotHeld: You don't hold the cards this combo needs

dialog.boardTargetPending: Choose the card's target on the board to play it.

merchantsBoon.title: Merchant's Boon
merchantsBoon.instructions: Make one 2:1 trade with the bank. Pick what you give (2) and what you receive (1).

roadToll.title: Road Toll
roadToll.instructions: Name a resource. Every other player holding it gives you 1.

trailblazer.title: Trailblazer
trailblazer.instructions: Build 1 free road anywhere empty — no connection to your network required.

highwayman.title: Highwayman
highwayman.instructions: Relocate the robber to a new hex. No steal.

rideByNight.title: Ride by Night
rideByNight.instructions: Move the robber and resolve a steal, then place your free road.

nightOfPlenty.title: Night of Plenty
nightOfPlenty.instructions: Move the robber and resolve a steal, then take 1 free resource from the bank.

monorail.title: Monorail
monorail.instructions: Take all lumber and brick from every other player, then build 1 or 2 free roads.

megaKnight.title: Mega Knight
megaKnight.instructions: Choose an opponent — you steal one of their development cards at random.

superSettle.title: Super-Settle
superSettle.instructions: Discard your Victory Point card and choose a settlement to upgrade to a city for free.
